title: Sora Launches New Fantasy Romance Manga
content: The combined 10th and 11th issue of Hakusensha 's Hana to Yume magazine announced on Monday sora will launch a new manga titled Bо̄kyakugo no Aletia (Aletia of Forgotten Memory) in the next issue on May 20. The series follows a young girl who suffers a cruel destiny in a world of magic.
author: ANN

title: Aki Kusaka Launches New Manga on May 20
content: This year's combined 10th and 11th issue of Shueisha 's Margaret magazine announced on Monday Aki Kusaka will launch a new manga titled Ao to Haru in the 12th issue on May 20. The magazine teases the youth love story manga will center on a popular young man who has a shocking encounter.
author: ANN

title: Ayano Takeda's 'Sono Hi, Akane wa Sora o Tonda' Novel Gets Manga
content: The official X/Twitter account for Gentosha 's Comic Boost manga website revealed last Friday that author Ayano Takeda 's Sono Hi, Akane wa Sora o Tonda (That Day, Akane Fell From the Sky) novel is inspiring a manga adaptation by Kanan Yamada that will launch on Comic Boost on May 1.
author: ANN

title: Nezumi's First Love Manga Enters Final Arc in Next Chapter
content: Kodansha USA Publishing is releasing the manga in English, and it describes the story: Nezumi was raised by the yakuza to be a killer. It's all she's ever known. Love is something she's never experienced or even contemplated…until she meets an ordinary, hapless young man named Ao in an arcade during a hit.
author: ANN

title: Nikumaru's Kōshiki Furin Manga Ends in 3 Chapters
content: This year's 21st issue of Kodansha 's Young Magazine revealed on Monday that Nikumaru 's Kōshiki Furin ( Official Adultery? ) manga will end in three chapters. If there are no delays, the manga will end in the magazine's 25th issue on April 18 (next week is a double issue for the magazine due to Golden Week).
author: ANN

title: ChaO Anime Film Earns US$112,000 in U.S. Box Office
content: The film opened in North American theaters on April 10. It earned US$70,254 in its first three days. The film earned US$27,538 on April 10, US$23,826 on April 11, and US$18,890 on April 12. The film opened in Japan on August 15. The film will screen in 16 countries and regions around the world.
author: ANN

title: ChaO Anime Film Earns US$112,000 in U.S. Box Office
content: ChaO Anime Film Earns US$112,000 in U.S. Box Office
author: ANN

title: 'Go for It, Nakamura!' Anime Casts Yō Taichi
content: Aniplex announced that Yō Taichi is joining the cast of the television anime of Syundei 's Go for It, Nakamura! ( Ganbare! Nakamura-kun!! ) boys-love manga on Monday. Taichi voices Reiko Aokiyama, a third-year student at Hoshimi High School and the president of the Occult Horror Club.
author: ANN

title: 4 Years Ago, The Best Time Travel Thriller Made a Shocking Debut
content: Anime centering around the themes of time travel or time loops are scarce, but whenever such a series is released, it immediately piques viewers’ interest. Not only that, the first episode needs to be captivating enough to pull the audience on a thrilling journey.
author: ComicBook

title: Cancelled Shonen Jump Creator Breaks Silence on Anticipated Return
content: Weekly Shonen Jump surprised fans with the return of Atsushi Nakamura for his third serialization. April is by far the most exciting month of the year so far, as the magazine releases three new series each week.
author: ComicBook
